answer: mart_readmission.csv is the certified readmission mart with encounter_id, patient_nbr, gender, race, age band, time_in_hospital, readmit_30d, and related features. Chat dimensional metrics read from this file.
Feature definitions live in data/nosql/feature_dictionary.json; KPI definitions in metric_dictionary.json. Run scripts/build_project_knowledge.py to refresh RAG documents.
